scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/wrst && tsc -p packages/cli && tsc -p example
scripts.android:run: cd packages/native-android && ./gradlew installDebug && adb shell monkey -p com.example.wearos -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
scripts.ios:build: xcodebuild -project packages/native-ios/AppleWatch.xcodeproj -scheme 'AppleWatch Watch App' -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=watchOS Simulator' build
